name: photoshop-beta-control
description: Control local Adobe Photoshop or Photoshop Beta from Codex through a Windows COM, ExtendScript, and MCP bridge.

interface.shortDescription: Let Codex operate local Photoshop for editable design and office workflows.
interface.longDescription: A local Windows MCP bridge for controlling Adobe Photoshop or Photoshop Beta from Codex. It supports document creation, image placement, editable text layers, layer management, editable vector paths, texture-aware recoloring, common adjustments, exports, batch workflows, and custom ExtendScript for advanced tasks.
defaultPrompt: Open this image in Photoshop, add a title layer, and export a PNG.
Create a 1024x1024 Photoshop document and draw editable line-art paths.
Batch resize these product images and export web-ready JPEG copies.
